title: Geepas 1000W Pancake & Crepe Maker - Electric Non-Stick Cooking Plate with Adjustable Temperature Control - Power & Ready Lights Wooden Spreader & Spatula Included - 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ NON-STICK HOT PLATE, EASY TO CLEAN: The crepe maker features a non-stick cooking surface, ensuring that your crepes effortlessly slide off the pan without sticking or tearing. This makes it easy to achieve perfectly cooked and beautifully presented crepes every time. Once you’ve made your pancakes the surface is super easy to wipe clean once cooled down.

✅ RAISED EDGES – The surround of the electric pancake maker is slightly raised to keep your mixture on the hot plate and reduce spillage/waste. The hot plate has thermostat control, and has an adjustable temperature gauge so you can cook the perfect pancakes your way.

✅ VERSATILE APPLIANCE – Not only does this hot plate cook delicious pancakes and crepes, but it is also suitable to make omelettes, chapattis, & rotas, tortillas and more. In order to create the perfect pancake the set comes complete with a wooden spreader and spatula.

✅ LARGE COOKING DIAMETER: The crepe maker comes with a generously sized cooking diameter, allowing you to make larger-sized crepes or multiple smaller ones simultaneously. This feature is particularly useful when cooking for a family or hosting gatherings. It's perfect for making breakfast crepes, dinner party desserts or delicious savoury snacks, any time, any day.
✅ BATTER SPREADER AND SPATULA INCLUDED, 2 YEAR WARRANTY - The spreader helps you achieve an even size and shape. Once the batter sets use the spatula to check its cooked underneath and to turn over.
description: Product Description NON-STICK SURFACE Ensures easy flipping and removal of crepes without tearing. ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE Cooking individual meals or small batches of foods. LARGE SURFACE Generous surface area for creating large crepes or several smaller ones at once. SPREADER & SPATULA INCLUDED Batter spreader and spatula for easy application and flipping. QUICK HEATING Even heat distribution for consistent crepes. POWER INDICATOR LIGHT The indicator light shows when the pancake maker is up to the right temperature. EASY TO CLEAN The non-stick coating on the cooking surface enables it to be easily clean. SUITABLE FOR VARIETY PURPOSE The versatility Functions as a grill pan for various items.
